mitre_techniques.name: Email Collection: Remote Email Collection
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
SigninLogs
| where AppDisplayName == "Microsoft Exchange"
| where AuthenticationRequirement == "1"
| where City == "Redmond"
| where ResultType == 0

mitre_techniques.name: Brute Force: Password Spraying
mitre_techniques.best_kql: `AppDisplayName in ~"Microsoft Outlook|Excel|Word|Intune|Azure AD Graph" and AuthenticationRequirement == "MFA" and ClientAppUsed == "Microsoft Authentication Broker" and RiskLevelDuringSignIn == 1 and ConditionalAccessStatus == "NotApplicable" and CountryOrRegion == "United States" and ResultType == 0`

mitre_techniques.name: Steal Application Access Token
mitre_techniques.best_kql: where IPAddress in ("162.243.103.246", "50.16.16.211", "34.204.119.63", "178.62.3.223", "27.133.154.218") or UserAgent has_any ("python-requests/", "Go-http-client/", "curl/", "libwww-perl/", "masscan/", "zgrab/", "nmap scripting engine", "sqlmap/", "nikto/", "dirbuster", "gobuster", "nuclei/", "httpx/", "wfuzz/", "ffuf/") and AuthenticationRequirement != 1 and ClientAppUsed != "Microsoft Edge" and AppDisplayName != "Office 365" and RiskLevelDuringSignIn != 0 and ConditionalAccessStatus != "Work account" and CountryOrRegion != "US" and ResultType == 0

mitre_techniques.name: Modify Authentication Process: Multi-Factor Authentication
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
AzureActiveDirectory | where AuthenticationRequirement == 'multiFactorAuthentication'
                      and ClientAppUsed == 'Azure AD'
                      and ConditionalAccessStatus == 'success'
                      and (CountryOrRegion == 'USA' or City != 'New York')
                      and RiskLevelDuringSignIn > 1
                      and ResultType == 0

mitre_techniques.name: Valid Accounts: Cloud Accounts
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
Signins
| where AuthenticationRequirement == 2 or ClientAppUsed == "" or AppDisplayName == "Azure Resource Manager (ARM)" or RiskLevelDuringSignIn == 1 or ConditionalAccessStatus == 2 or CountryOrRegion == "US" or UserAgent has_any ("python-requests/", "Go-http-client/", "curl/", "libwww-perl/", "masscan/", "zgrab/", "nmap scripting engine", "sqlmap/", "nikto/", "dirbuster", "gobuster", "nuclei/", "httpx/", "wfuzz/", "ffuf/")

mitre_techniques.name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Application Access Token
Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools
Permission Groups Discovery: Cloud Groups
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
SigninLogs
| where AppDisplayName in ("Microsoft Graph Explorer")
| where AuthenticationRequirement has "MFA"
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn != "Low"

mitre_techniques.name: Cloud Service Discovery
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
where IPAddress in ("172.31.64.128", "172.31.64.129")
and (AuthenticationRequirement == "MFA" or UserAgent has_any ("python-requests/", "Go-http-client/", "curl/", "libwww-perl/", "masscan/", "zgrab/", "nmap scripting engine", "sqlmap/", "nikto/", "dirbuster", "gobuster", "nuclei/", "httpx/", "wfuzz/", "ffuf/"))
and (AppDisplayName == "Azure Resource Graph Explorer" or AppDisplayName == "Azure Cost Management")
and (RiskLevelDuringSignIn != "Low" or ConditionalAccessStatus != "UnconditionalAccess")
and CountryOrRegion == "US"
and ResultType == 0

mitre_techniques.name: Exfiltration Over Web Service: Exfiltration to Cloud Storage
Account Manipulation: Additional Cloud Credentials
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
SigninLogs
| where ResultType == 0
| where OperationName has "Add X509 certificate to application"
| where IPAddress not in ("162.243.103.246", "50.16.16.211", "34.204.119.63", "178.62.3.223", "27.133.154.218")
| where UserAgent not has_any ("python-requests/", "Go-http-client/", "curl/", "libwww-perl/", "masscan/", "zgrab/", "nmap scripting engine", "sqlmap/", "nikto/", "dirbuster", "gobuster", "nuclei/", "httpx/", "wfuzz/", "ffuf/")

mitre_techniques.name: Create Account: Cloud Account
mitre_techniques.best_kql:
SigninLogs
| where AppDisplayName has "B2B Guest Invitation"
| where AuthenticationRequirement has "MFA Not Required"
| where ResultType == 0
